title: quercus peduncularis subsp. pilicaulis
intro: Quercus peduncularis subsp. pilicaulis, also known as the Himalayan oak or Himalayan pedunculate oak, is a subspecies of deciduous tree native to the Himalayas. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus peduncularis subsp. pilicaulis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
